description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Effect You concentrate your light upon an area of magical darkness, attempting a counteract check using your @Check[fortitude|options:counteract] saving throw or @Check[nature|options:counteract] modifier against the target's DC. Your counteract rank is equal to half your level rounded up. Successfully counteracting the magical darkness suppresses its ability to prevent light from passing through it for 1 minute, but not any other effects.
